scripts.tauri:dev: cd apps/tauri && WINIT_UNIX_BACKEND=wayland GDK_BACKEND=wayland WEBKIT_DISABLE_DMABUF_RENDERER=1 cargo tauri dev --config src-tauri/tauri.dev.conf.json
scripts.tauri:prod: npm run build && cd apps/tauri && WINIT_UNIX_BACKEND=wayland GDK_BACKEND=wayland WEBKIT_DISABLE_DMABUF_RENDERER=1 cargo tauri dev --config src-tauri/tauri.prod.conf.json
scripts.tauri:build: npm run build && cd apps/tauri && cargo tauri build
scripts.tauri:android:dev: cd apps/tauri && cargo tauri android dev
scripts.tauri:android:dev:offline: npm run build && cd apps/tauri && cargo tauri android build --debug --apk && cd src-tauri/gen/android && ./gradlew app:installUniversalDebug && adb shell monkey -p com.futo.notes.tauri -c android.intent.category.LAUNCHER 1
scripts.tauri:android:build: cd apps/tauri && cargo tauri android build
scripts.tauri:ios:dev: cd apps/tauri && cargo tauri ios dev
scripts.tauri:ios:build: cd apps/tauri && cargo tauri ios build
